title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.325 - Board, quorum
text:
351.325.  Board, quorum. — A majority of the full board of directors shall constitute a quorum for the transaction of business unless a greater number is required by the articles of incorporation or the bylaws.  The act of the majority of the directors present at a meeting at which a quorum is present shall be the act of the board of directors, unless the act of a greater number is required by the articles of incorporation or the bylaws.
(RSMo 1939 § 5033, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 39, A.L. 1979 S.B. 216) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4558; 1919 § 9752; 1909 § 2992
